title: Gronophyllum rhopalocarpum

Gronophyllum rhopalocarpum is native to Malaysia, where it is found in the rainforests. The tree is part of the order Malpighiales, which is a group of flowering plants. Gronophyllum rhopalocarpum is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within its genus.
